arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the OAM link.

id.description: The unique identifier of the OAM link.

label.description: The label associated with the OAM link.

label_template.description: The template used for the label of the OAM link.

link_configuration.description: Configuration details for log group and metric settings of the OAM link.

link_id.description: The ID used to identify the OAM link within AWS.

resource_types.description: The types of resources associated with the OAM link.

sink_arn.description: The ARN of the sink resource connected to the OAM link.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the OAM link.
